# Awesome Forms
> Beautiful, open-source form templates. Self-contained HTML files that submit to Sutrena out of the box.

## What This Is

A collection of beautifully designed form templates. Each template is a single HTML file with inline CSS and minimal JavaScript — no dependencies, no build step. Every template submits to Sutrena by default, so they work immediately when opened in a browser. Replace the endpoint with your own backend if preferred.

## Design Templates (9)

| Slug | Style | Category | HTML |
| neo-brutalist-waitlist | Bold borders, chunky type, bright yellow | waitlist | templates/neo-brutalist-waitlist/index.html |
| minimal-contact | Clean whitespace, hairline borders, system fonts | contact | templates/minimal-contact/index.html |
| glassmorphism-feedback | Frosted glass on gradient, CSS star rating | feedback | templates/glassmorphism-feedback/index.html |
| retro-newsletter | Terminal aesthetic, monospace, dashed borders | newsletter | templates/retro-newsletter/index.html |
| gradient-survey | Soft gradient mesh, warm sunset tones | survey | templates/gradient-survey/index.html |
| neumorphism-booking | Soft shadows, pressed inputs, clean UI | booking | templates/neumorphism-booking/index.html |
| elegant-rsvp | Dark navy, gold accents, invitation style | rsvp | templates/elegant-rsvp/index.html |
| darkmode-bugreport | Developer dark theme, monospace, red accents | bug-report | templates/darkmode-bugreport/index.html |
| clean-order | Professional, trust-building, blue accents | order | templates/clean-order/index.html |

## Using with Sutrena API

Each template has a meta.json with Sutrena field definitions and a formId. To deploy as a hosted form:

1. Get a key: POST https://sutrena.com/api/trial (no signup)
2. Create a form: POST https://sutrena.com/api/forms with templateId or custom fields from meta.json
3. Share the URL: https://sutrena.com/f/FORM_ID

Base URL for all Sutrena links: https://sutrena.com
- Form URL: https://sutrena.com/f/{formId}
- Dashboard URL: https://sutrena.com/d/{dashboardId}
- Submit endpoint: https://sutrena.com/api/forms/{formId}/submit (no auth required, CORS enabled)

## Using with Sutrena MCP

If the agent has MCP access, use these tools directly:

| Tool | Purpose |
| sutrena_create_form | Create a hosted form with custom fields |
| sutrena_create_from_template | Create form + dashboard from template (one call) |
| sutrena_list_forms | List all forms with names, stats, submission counts |
| sutrena_get_submissions | Get recent submissions |
| sutrena_search_submissions | Search/filter by date, field, text, status |
| sutrena_export_csv | Export submissions as CSV |
| sutrena_update_form | Update fields, success message, submit label |
| sutrena_duplicate_form | Copy a form |
| sutrena_delete_form | Delete form and dashboards |
| sutrena_create_dashboard | Create dashboard with DSL widgets |
| sutrena_update_dashboard | Update dashboard |
| sutrena_delete_dashboard | Delete dashboard |
| sutrena_create_webhook | Webhook for submission events |
| sutrena_list_webhooks | List webhooks |
| sutrena_test_webhook | Test ping |
| sutrena_delete_webhook | Delete webhook |
| sutrena_get_webhook_deliveries | Delivery logs |

MCP endpoint: https://sutrena.com/api/mcp (Bearer token auth)

## Sutrena Built-in Templates (14)

| Template | Use case | One-liner |
| contact | Business contact form | `{"templateId": "contact", "createDashboard": true}` |
| feedback | Product feedback with ratings | `{"templateId": "feedback", "createDashboard": true}` |
| bug-report | Bug tracking with severity | `{"templateId": "bug-report", "createDashboard": true}` |
| waitlist | Launch waitlist | `{"templateId": "waitlist", "createDashboard": true}` |
| survey | Customer satisfaction | `{"templateId": "survey", "createDashboard": true}` |
| poll | Quick voting / polls | `{"templateId": "poll", "createDashboard": true, "publicResults": true}` |
| rsvp | Event registration | `{"templateId": "rsvp", "createDashboard": true, "maxSubmissions": 50}` |
| nps | Net Promoter Score | `{"templateId": "nps", "createDashboard": true, "uniqueBy": ["email"]}` |
| quiz | Quizzes and assessments | `{"templateId": "quiz", "createDashboard": true}` |
| newsletter | Email signups | `{"templateId": "newsletter", "createDashboard": true, "uniqueBy": ["email"]}` |
| booking | Appointment scheduling | `{"templateId": "booking", "createDashboard": true}` |
| client-intake | Client onboarding forms | `{"templateId": "client-intake", "createDashboard": true}` |
| order | Order forms for shops | `{"templateId": "order", "createDashboard": true}` |
| preorder | Limited drops and pre-orders | `{"templateId": "preorder", "createDashboard": true, "maxSubmissions": 100}` |

## Custom Forms

11 field types: text, email, textarea, number, select, checkbox, url, tel, date, hidden, file

## Links

- Template gallery: https://sutrena.com/templates
- Full docs: https://sutrena.com/llms-full.txt
- API schema: https://sutrena.com/api/schema
- OpenAPI spec: https://sutrena.com/api/openapi.json
- MCP discovery: https://sutrena.com/.well-known/mcp.json
